{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323024726F3AC0AB44F9236DE2E02"}"},"total":6497},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7086501985876394759","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很正能量的一本书。从无到有。经历了无数能人先辈的呕心沥血。希望能如同本书描写的那般崛起。至于外星发现…那就不是我们这代人能看到了。文中所有专业知识（虽然我是理科废）真的让人“大开眼界”，但我还是衷心希望祖国能如书中那样繁荣昌盛，富强！（不服就干）[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1649954828,"group_id":"6943550023195954206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"面向大海春暖花开！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5Pu0iFMPwkPuHlVuxBM4g=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e12c12ee1e6401e936eb8949d5b6a49~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788050&x-signature=GpIRu86FEEgPnqkAkP4strPWZ5g%3D","user_id":"329485730987399","user_name":"Poka"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"329485730987399","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1722025124,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6943550023195954206","book_info":{"abstract":"【签到+学霸+黑科技+直播+外卖+无敌+单女主】【同名短剧已上线】
陈诺，华清大二学生，暑假兼职送外卖被神级签到系统绑定，系统初级时只要顾客签收外卖，就能签到随机获得技能，系统升级还能抽奖；
物理教授家中签到，获得大学物理教授级技能；
研究所签到，获得毫秒级脑波交互技术；
……
叮！恭喜宿主抽中碳基芯片、无人驾驶技术、机甲、可控核聚变……；
他打造科研圣地，助力夏国崛起；
签到三年后，他在科研领域，世间无敌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/557325a472dbbc7db63dab7747ca512d","author":"昆吾","author_id":"","book_id":"6943550023195954206","book_name":"签到三年，我的学霸身份被曝光了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6947616513482293796","read_count":"40078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1834535"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"878","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,无敌,系统,直播,外卖,学霸,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/f4c520317ce10eb28c0aa4a2c67968fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389246&x-signature=P4U4uQVGAqA6K%2BtucGAXj1WPXhY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4586722154","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.66688661e+08"},"
